creator: grembo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hm, phabricator is marked as broken for 8.1. I can look into upstream patches, AFAIK, even though the project is not actively maintained, they adopted some patches (which should also help with 8.0). Is this urgent?

In the meantime, you could try to set `error_reporting = E_ALL & ~E_DEPRECATED & ~E_STRICT` in php.ini (which was the default before 8.0).
